## Description

<!-- Describe the changes introduced by this pull request. Link to related issues or tickets. -->

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] feat: New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] fix: Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] docs: Documentation update
- [ ] refactor: Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] test: Adding or updating tests
- [ ] chore: Build, CI, or tooling changes
- [ ] BREAKING CHANGE: Change that breaks existing functionality

## Related Issues

<!-- Link to any related issues, discussions, or feature requests. -->

## Checklist

<!-- All items must be checked before requesting review -->

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards and conventions
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` and fixed any issues
- [ ] I have run `npm run typecheck` and fixed any issues
- [ ] I have added or updated tests to cover my changes
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`cd apps/api && npm test` and/or `cd apps/web && npm test`)
- [ ] I have updated documentation in `docs/` for any changed behavior
- [ ] Zod schemas in `packages/shared` have been updated to reflect API contract changes
- [ ] My changes do not introduce any new security vulnerabilities
- [ ] I have checked for any hardcoded secrets or credentials

### If this is a UI change

- [ ] I have verified the UI renders correctly at responsive breakpoints
- [ ] I have tested with keyboard navigation
- [ ] I have verified dark/light mode compatibility
